title: Advancements: Ages
body:
What is Advancements: Ages?
---------------------------
It's a simple mod that adds eleven (11) advancements in the game. Influenced by different ages in history namely; Prehistoric Age, Paleolithic Age, Mesolithic Age, Neolithic Age, Calcolithic Age, Bronze Age, Iron Age, Renaissance Age, Industrial Age, Machine Age, and Atomic Age.

 
The advancements cannot be triggered by any events in the game. It can be triggered via the /advancement grant command. It is best used in conjunction with mods that adds advancements to the player when doing certain quests or tasks like FTB Quests or any other questing mods that can give rewards (advancements) through commands. You can use command blocks too.


Can be used for modpacks aiming for progression. You can use Game Stages to stage recipes/items.

Originally made for a modpack I'm currently working on.

 

Full credits to these mods for some of the textures used in the mod:
No copyright infringement intended

Create - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create
Mekanism - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mekanism
Magitek Mechs - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/magitek-mechs
